badgeEuropean: Corporate Performance Governance - European Corporate 360° Appraisal Matrix
subEuropean: Professional appraisal based on 6 competency pillars (Discipline, Productivity, Quality, Teamwork, HSE, and Initiative) with 9-Box talent matrix and IDP/PIP plans.
bonusDetail: European Performance Bonus for exceeding SLA and quality standards
penaltyDetail: Administrative penalty for non-compliance with Safety, Hygiene, or standard SOPs
pillar1Desc: Adherence to official shift times (09:00 AM) and GPS Geofencing.
pillar2Desc: Task completion volume, response speed, and meeting required throughput rates.
pillar3Desc: Zero operational returns, adherence to inspection standards, and error prevention.
pillar4Desc: Positive communication and seamless coordination with other stations during peak hours.
pillar5Desc: Adherence to safety standards, equipment care, and workstation cleanliness.
pillar6Desc: Suggesting improvements, smart problem handling, and efficient system usage.
idpAddPlaceholder: Add a new operational goal (e.g., zero returns this month)...
noLedger: No recent financial movements or deductions recorded
placeholderBonus: e.g., Achieved 100% quality and attendance standards this month...
placeholderPenalty: e.g., Violated HSE procedures or unexcused tardiness...
termNoticeSub: Issued by HR & Operations Dept - MJRH INDUSTRIAL REVOLUTION
termP1: Based on the comprehensive periodic appraisal of attendance data and task completion for the current year, the following employee's performance was reviewed:
termP2: It has been decided to notify the employee of this final warning due to repeated tardiness, absence, or low productivity without acceptable justification. This document serves as an administrative acknowledgment leading to Form 6 social insurance termination.
